---
title: "Silja Kreibohm, MD"
image: "../img/people/silja.jpg"
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:Kreibohm.Silja@mh-hannover.de
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/
    - icon: info-circle # ORCID doesn't have a native icon in many sets, this works well
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/silja-kreibohm-9a23b5335/
---

Short description/biography/hobbies of you.

[← Back to Team](../our_team.qmd#current-members){.btn .btn-orange .btn-sm role="button"}
